No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the syllabus connects to poverty eradication or related targets.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course emphasizes 'research ethics,' 'Respect Copyright,' and 'logical reasoning,' which promote ethical conduct and align with the rule of law (Target 16.3).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course includes 'peer review exercise' and aims for students to 'communicate and collaborate with peers,' fostering foundational skills for partnerships (Target 17.17).
